name: Firecrawl
summary: Read a web page (your site, profile, or company page) and pull out structured facts — used to draft your workspace profile from a link during onboarding.

docs.instructions: Create an API key at firecrawl.dev → Dashboard → API Keys (free tier available). Connecting here validates against hosted Firecrawl (api.firecrawl.dev). Self-hosting? Set FIRECRAWL_API_URL (legacy FIRECRAWL_BASE_URL) in your .env — the firecrawl-direct skill routes there at runtime; note this connect/validate check still pings hosted, so wiring it needs a hosted key.
